risk_register.risk: Continued high crash rate will accelerate user churn
risk_register.mitigation: Roll back to previous stable version or deploy hotfix within 4 hours

risk_register.risk: Poor API performance driving negative user experience
risk_register.mitigation: Scale backend resources and optimize critical paths

risk_register.risk: Elevated churn will impact LTV and revenue targets
risk_register.mitigation: Proactive outreach to at-risk users with retention offers

action_plan.action: Immediately halt further rollout to new users
Root cause analysis of crash spike by device/OS
Deploy crash rate hotfix or roll back to v3.1
Update status page and prepare customer comms
Review payment failure logs with payment provider

internal: Slack #eng-alerts: Current crash rate and mitigation status
Daily war room standup at 10am until resolved
Post-mortem scheduled for end of week
external: Status page incident report: 'Performance degradation under investigation'
If decision is PAUSE/ROLLBACK: Email to affected users acknowledging issues
Support team script for crash/payment complaints

would_increase_confidence: Root cause analysis of crash pattern completed
